description: Style Note Now give your casual wear a twist of style with this pair of slippers from red chief. Wear them with your off-duty ensembles. Product Details Khaki sandals with criss- cross forefoot straps, midfoot strap and an ankle strap, fastened by a velcro closure Soft and foamy footbed Outsole adhered to the upper for durability TPU outsole with branched grooves and arched midfoot  Material and Care Leather Wipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust Use a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine
